description_long: This object is a modern, flat-panel radiator with a sleek, minimalist design. It features eight evenly spaced vertical columns, each with a rectangular cross-section, forming a uniform and symmetrical appearance. The radiator is finished in a matte black color, giving it a contemporary and stylish look suitable for urban interiors or garages. The side profile reveals a slim depth, with mounting brackets visible at the bottom edges, indicating it is designed to stand on the floor. The top and bottom edges are flat, with no visible grilles or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. There are no visible valves or pipe connections on the exterior, suggesting they may be located on the underside or rear.
description: A sleek, matte black radiator with eight vertical flat columns and a minimalist, modern design. It is floor-standing with visible mounting brackets and a uniform, solid appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing eight evenly spaced vertical columns and the full width of the radiator.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim depth and the flat, rectangular profile of the columns, with mounting brackets visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same vertical columns and overall structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and mounting brackets at the base.
attribute_pipe_connections: No visible pipe connections; likely located at the bottom or rear, implied by mounting brackets.
